items.name_cn:
Top Upgraded Version
Size: 21 x 11.5 x 4.5cm
Lady Dior Woc Handle Pearl Chain Bag, Spring/Summer New Arrival, crafted in patent leather with a woven pattern. The flap design features a D.I.O.R. charm for a touch of elegance. Practical with multiple compartments and card slots for daily essentials, it is an ideal companion for both day and evening wear. Equipped with a top handle and a detachable chain adorned with resin beads, it can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.

specs.rawTitle:
Top Upgraded Version
Size: 21 x 11.5 x 4.5cm

Equipped with a top handle and a detachable chain adorned with resin beads, it can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.

items.name_cn:
!!️
Lady latest limited edition 4-compartment bag with chain, Dior bag style, lined with sheepskin, matches any set of limited edition hardware, meticulously crafted from lambskin, a must-have Dior bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻, can be worn crossbody or handheld, full of feminine charm, classic and stylish style. A beautiful bag that fashion icons and on Instagram all have, don't miss it ❤️
size:20*17*8cm

￼ !!️
Hobo star chain bag grey denim series
Brand new grey denim fabric, premium and durable
Box bag shape design, soft and lightweight silhouette
Equipped with an adjustable long shoulder strap, greatly enhancing practicality
Classic star logo circular charm, another highlight
Exquisite and cute, an irresistible bag style
size:28.5*10*14.5cm p0030920680
